title: Subsidize Coal Industry
description: Redirect government funds to domestic coal producers, boosting energy output and industrial jobs — but at an environmental cost.

choices.label: Reject
choices.flavour: The energy lobby files a formal objection.

title: Expand Standing Army
description: Authorize a major increase in military personnel and equipment. Costs are significant; so is the deterrent effect.

choices.label: Authorize
choices.flavour: Conscription notices go out at dawn.

choices.label: Decline
choices.flavour: The generals are displeased but not surprised.

title: Civil Liberties Reform
description: Expand rights of assembly, speech, and religious practice. Popular with diverse populations; seen as weakness by traditionalists.

choices.label: Pass
choices.flavour: Crowds gather in the squares. Some are celebrating.

choices.label: Table it
choices.flavour: Another cycle without reform. The opposition takes note.
